title: alsine dillenii
intro: Alsine dillenii, also known as Dillenia indica or Wild Coffee, is a plant species that belongs to the family Dilleniaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Alsine dillenii include treating fever, diarrhea, and various skin conditions, as well as being used as a natural remedy for wounds and insect bites. Alsine dillenii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, making it a versatile medicinal plant in traditional medicine.
